title: Turborepo scaffold
description: Convert shadowbroker-deployment into a Turborepo monorepo. Structure: apps/web (Shadowbroker Next.js frontend), apps/gate (decoy landing + auth — may merge into web), backend/ (Python FastAPI, not a JS package). Add turbo.json, root package.json with workspaces, shared tsconfig. Verify turbo build pipeline works.

title: Bootstrap apps/web from Shadowbroker frontend
description: Clone BigBodyCobain/Shadowbroker frontend/ into apps/web. Verify it builds standalone (next build). Preserve all public assets, map styles, fonts. Set BACKEND_URL env var pointing to localhost:8000 for dev. Confirm Vercel can build it.

title: Merge auth gate into apps/web
description: Port decoy landing page and auth gate from current shadowbroker-deployment into apps/web. Route structure: / = decoy (IASE spreadsheet enthusiasts), /login = hidden auth (triggered by 5x copyright click), /dashboard = protected Shadowbroker map. Port HiddenAuth component, /api/auth/validate route, /api/auth/session route, and middleware. Remove apps/gate if it was created separately.

title: Deploy backend to Fly.io
description: Deploy ghcr.io/bigbodycobain/shadowbroker-backend:latest to Fly.io free tier. Steps: fly launch with existing Docker image, attach persistent volume for backend_data, set secrets (OPENSKY_CLIENT_ID, OPENSKY_CLIENT_SECRET, AIS_API_KEY, ADMIN_KEY). Verify /api/health endpoint responds. Note: Fly.io free tier = 3 shared VMs + 3GB storage, no charge within limits.

title: Obtain and configure API keys
description: Register for free API keys: OpenSky Network (opensky-network.org — free OAuth2, flight tracking ADS-B), AISstream (aisstream.io — free WebSocket key, ship tracking). Add to Fly.io secrets. Optionally: NASA FIRMS (fire data), alerts.in.ua (Ukraine alerts). Document which keys are required vs optional in backend/.env.example.

title: Wire BACKEND_URL end-to-end
description: Set BACKEND_URL in Vercel env vars pointing to Fly.io backend URL. Verify the Next.js catch-all proxy at apps/web/src/app/api/[...path]/route.ts forwards correctly. Test flight data, ship data, and health endpoint through the full stack. Confirm CORS_ORIGINS is set on backend to allow Vercel domain.

title: Refactor frontend to match preferences
description: Adjust Shadowbroker frontend styling and layout to personal preferences. Scope TBD — define specific changes before starting this issue. Examples: color scheme tweaks, panel layout, typography, component naming conventions. Follow the original repo as the reference path; only change what has a clear reason.
